translations.Maak lokale stemprofielen, beheer perman: Create local voice profiles, manage permanent samples and optionally link a profile to a Home Assistant person.
translations.Voeg minimaal één duidelijk spraakfragme: Add at least one clear 5–30 second speech sample.
translations.Gebruik een ander fragment dan waarmee j: For a fair test, use a different sample from the ones used for enrolment. Tests are saved under Analysis.
translations.Bekijk alle geanalyseerde opnamen. Analy: View all analysed recordings. Analysis audio is deleted automatically after the configured retention period; enrolment samples are kept permanently.
translations.Speaker: Speaker
translations.Pas de filters aan of gebruik Assist om: Adjust the filters or use Assist to analyse new audio.
translations.Gebruik actieve enrollment-samples om de: Use active enrolment samples to tune the threshold and score margin for your voices.
translations.Deze runtime-instellingen worden lokaal: These runtime settings are stored locally and can be changed without access to config.yaml.
translations.DF2 blijft de veilige standaard en fallb: DF2 remains the safe default and fallback until latency, STT and speaker recognition have been validated on the Home Assistant VM.
translations.De globale backend wordt ook als standaa: The global backend is also used as the default for manual processing.
translations.De voorsprong die de beste speaker-score: The minimum lead the best speaker score must have over the second candidate after the recognition threshold has been met. At
translations.staat deze extra controle uit. Een hoger: this additional check is disabled. A higher value prevents identity mix-ups, but produces “ambiguous” or “unknown” more often. Example:
translations.vereist minstens 0,08 verschil. Als je o: requires a difference of at least 0.08. When you apply a recommendation under Calibration, its calculated margin is used instead of this base value.
translations.Deze koppeling is alleen voor personalis: This link is for personalisation only and never changes user permissions.
translations.Gebruik liefst 2–3 heldere samples van e: Preferably use 2–3 clear samples of 5–30 seconds each, without music.
translations.Vandaag loop ik rustig naar buiten. De z: Today I walk outside at a relaxed pace. The sun shines on the green grass and a small bird sings cheerfully by the open window.
translations.Microfoon vereist een beveiligde Home As: The microphone requires a secure Home Assistant connection and browser permission.
translations.Het gekozen apparaat zegt “Spreek nu” en: The selected device says “Speak now” and records one sample without a pre-announcement chime. The text is not executed as an Assist command.
translations.Bestaand profiel met dezelfde naam verva: Replace an existing profile with the same name (old permanent samples remain in an inactive archive).
translations.Neem een nieuw fragment op of upload aud: Record a new sample or upload audio. You can listen to it before starting recognition.
translations.Kies wat er met de permanente enrollment: Choose what happens to the permanent enrolment WAV files. This choice cannot be restored automatically.
translations.Profiel verwijderen; WAV’s blijven als n: Delete the profile; WAV files remain in an unlinked archive.
translations.Profiel én alle permanente enrollment-WA: Permanently delete the profile and all enrolment WAV files.
translations.Sleep de markeringen om een bruikbaar st: Drag the markers to select a usable speech segment.
translations.De geselecteerde tijdsrange wordt perman: The selected time range is permanently stored as a WAV file and the profile is retrained.
translations.Audiogolfvorm met selecteerbare start en: Audio waveform with selectable start and end
translations.De minimale scoremarge moet tussen 0 en: The minimum score margin must be between 0 and 1.
translations.De bewaartermijn moet tussen 1 en 365 da: The retention period must be between 1 and 365 days.
translations.De maximale opslag moet minimaal 0,1 GB: Maximum storage must be at least 0.1 GB.
Original audio could not be loaded.
The selection could not be played.
translations.Permanente enrollment-WAV’s maken later: Permanent enrolment WAV files allow retraining later. Inactive samples are not used for recognition.
translations.Voor dit legacyprofiel zijn nog geen per: No permanent WAV samples are available for this legacy profile.
translations.Deze permanente WAV wordt definitief ver: This permanent WAV file will be deleted and the profile retrained.
translations.Ik wil deze permanente sample verwijdere: I want to delete this permanent sample
translations.Ik begrijp dat deze actie niet ongedaan: I understand that this action cannot be undone
translations.Kies een bestaand profiel of vul een nie: Select an existing profile or enter a new name.
translations.Audio permanent toegevoegd en profiel op: Audio added permanently and profile retrained
translations.Opname opnieuw geanalyseerd met de actue: Recording analysed again using the current profiles
translations.Alleen de afgeleide ruisonderdrukte WAV: Only the derived noise-suppressed WAV file and related processing metrics are cleared. The original, transcript and recognition result are retained.
translations.Ruisonderdrukking viel terug op het orig: Noise suppression fell back to the original
translations.Verwerking loopt nog; open dit detail la: Processing is still running; reopen these details later.
There are no recordings to delete.
translations.Ik wil deze analyse-audio definitief ver: I want to permanently delete this analysis audio
translations.False accepts wegen viermaal zwaarder da: False accepts are weighted four times more heavily than false rejects.
translations.De expliciete drempel en marge worden ve: The explicit threshold and margin are removed. The defaults from the add-on configuration are used again.
translations.Geen stemfragment ontvangen. Controleer: No voice sample received. Check that the Assist pipeline uses Speaker Recognition STT.
translations.Geen audio ontvangen. Gebruik in deze As: No audio received. Use the Speaker Recognition STT proxy in this Assist pipeline.
translations.Er is al een Voice-opname actief: A Voice recording is already active
translations.Deze Voice-opname is niet actief: This Voice recording is not active
translations.Een stemfragment moet minimaal 1 seconde: A voice sample must be at least 1 second long
translations.Een stemfragment mag maximaal 120 second: A voice sample may be no longer than 120 seconds
translations.Microfoonopname is hier niet beschikbaar: Microphone recording is not available here. Open Home Assistant over HTTPS or upload an audio sample.
translations.Geen toegang tot de microfoon. Controlee: Microphone access denied. Check the browser permission or upload audio.
translations.Alle permanente enrollment-WAV’s van dit: All permanent enrolment WAV files for this profile will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
translations.Ik wil het profiel en alle permanente au: I want to permanently delete the profile and all permanent audio

patterns.match: ^(.+) kan door deze browser niet worden gelezen$
patterns.replace: $1 cannot be read by this browser

patterns.match: ^Nog (\d+) genuine en (\d+) impostor-waarneming\(en\) nodig voordat je een advies kunt toepassen\.$
patterns.replace: $1 more genuine and $2 more impostor observations are required before you can apply a recommendation.

patterns.match: ^1 analyse-opname wordt definitief verwijderd\. Permanente enrollment-WAV’s blijven behouden\.$
patterns.replace: 1 analysis recording will be permanently deleted. Permanent enrolment WAV files are retained.

patterns.match: ^(\d+) analyse-opnamen wordt definitief verwijderd\. Permanente enrollment-WAV’s blijven behouden\.$
patterns.replace: $1 analysis recordings will be permanently deleted. Permanent enrolment WAV files are retained.
